title: VaultIt STATE_VECTOR
description: Formal schema for the VaultIt session continuity protocol. Every project tracked by vaultit-ai must produce a STATE_VECTOR.json that validates against this schema.

schema_version.description: Protocol version. Consumers must check this before parsing.

project.description: Project slug used as directory name in the bridge repo.

project_type.description: Categorical project type. Drives defaults in tooling and bootstrap behavior.

local_path.description: Absolute path to the project root on the operator's machine.

state_machine_status.description: Current state in the task lifecycle state machine.

active_task_id.description: Identifier for the currently active task (e.g. TASK-0029). Null when IDLE.

active_task_title.description: Human-readable title of the active task. Null when IDLE.

current_blocker.description: Description of what is blocking progress. Null when unblocked.

last_verified_state.description: Human-readable description of the last known-good state that passed all gates.

gates.description: Shell commands that must all exit 0 before any state transition is legal.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last STATE_VECTOR update.

repo.description: GitHub repository URL, or 'local only' if not pushed.

branch.description: Active git branch. Null if not using git.

repo_head_sha.description: Short SHA of the latest commit on the active branch.

effective_verified_sha.description: Short SHA of the commit that last passed all gates.

package_manager.description: Package manager in use (e.g. pip, npm, pnpm, cargo).

venv_path.description: Path to virtual environment, if applicable.

executor.description: Who (or what AI) is executing the current task.

operator.description: The human operator who owns this project.

team.description: Team roles for the current task lifecycle.
